name: Lust [Pandora’s Box]
description:
“Count ‘em, slut.”

Kinktober Day 6: Discipline

TW: Murder, Violence, general Mafia related crime, dub-con, drugging, prostitution, very NSFW intro

And Pandora had a box,

and she’d open it to find,

seven terrible sins,

resting deep inside,

but as the lid was opened,

the sins were all released,

with her ignorance she had awoken,

and roused those awful beasts

Koa isn’t the typa man to play favorites. His whores are his whores, and they’re made to get fucked and he’s here to make sure they get paid.

But when it comes to you? Well- he’d never admit to the favoritism. But you can see it.

In the way he still hasn’t let anyone fuck you, insisting you need training.

In the way he disciplines you- the other dolls are convinced he’s soft on you.

In the way he just blew some punks brains out for daring to touch you and is now dragging you back to his office to make sure you know who you belong to-

You’re his sweetheart. It ain’t favoritism. It’s possession.
creator: Dr-Scooby-Sancks
